why.title: Vim li cas cov neeg hloov mus rau Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia muab koj ib tus xov tooj tiag, ntse txhais lus, thiab ib txoj hauv kev meej mus ad-free thaum koj npaj txhij.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads ntawm Dawb, ib qho yooj yim Plus hloov kho thaum koj npaj txhij, thiab Premium tools TextNow tsis muaj.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-ua ntej tsim qauv, thiab built-in txhais lus es tsis yog qub-school hu forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Xa xov rau tus xov tooj tiag — tsis yog tsuas yog lwm app neeg siv — nrog AI thiab status built in. Zoo yog koj los ntawm apps xws li TextFree lossis TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Sib piv raws li cov ntaub ntawv pej xeem thiab yuav hloov raws sijhawm. Lwm dawb-xa xov apps xws li TextFree lossis TextMe feem ntau zoo ib yam li TextNow.

free.a: Yog. Dawb plan suav nrog Chatforia tus lej, hu, thiab xa xov nrog ads. Koj tuaj yeem nyob ntawm Dawb ntev npaum li koj xav, lossis hloov kho kom tshem ads thiab qhib ntau yam.

plusPremium.q: Qhov txawv ntawm Plus thiab Premium yog dab tsi?
plusPremium.a: Plus tshem ads thiab txuas ntxiv koj lus keeb kwm — zoo tshaj rau txhua hnub siv. Premium ntxiv customization ntxiv, AI tools rau rewrites thiab teb, thiab priority pab rau hnyav neeg siv.

esim.q: eSIM data packs ua haujlwm qhov twg?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile siv global eSIM npog. Muaj nyob ntawm koj lub teb chaws thiab ntaus ntawv. Koj yuav pom cov xaiv txhawb thaum activation hauv app.

cancel.q: Kuv tuaj yeem tso tseg lossis hloov phiaj xwm txhua lub sijhawm?
cancel.a: Yog. Koj tuaj yeem tswj lossis tso tseg koj subscription los ntawm billing nplooj hauv app. Hloov pauv siv tau thaum kawg ntawm koj tam sim no billing sijhawm.

family.q: Tsev neeg pob ua haujlwm li cas?
family.a: Tsev neeg pob tsim ib sib koom data pool hla ntau Chatforia accounts. Ib tus neeg them daim nqi, thiab koj tuaj yeem caw lossis tshem tswv cuab thiab teem txwv ib tus neeg.

account.q: Kuv yuav tsim lossis rov qab kuv account li cas?
account.a: Rub tawm app lossis siv web, nias “Tsim account”, txheeb xyuas koj email/xov tooj. Rov qab, siv “Tsis nco qab lo lus zais”.

privacy.a: Yog. Cov lus thiab hu yog end-to-end encrypted los ntawm qub. Tsuas yog koj thiab tus neeg txais tuaj yeem nyeem lawv.

translate.q: Tam sim txhais lus ua haujlwm li cas?
translate.a: Qhib “Auto-translate” hauv Settings → Pom & Hom lus. Peb txhais ntawm ntaus ntawv qhov twg txhawb, txwv tsis pub dhau secure APIs nrog tsawg metadata.

contact.a: Hu peb ntawm support@chatforia.com. Suav screenshots thiab koj app version.

contact.title: Hu Peb

intro.body: Txoj Cai Tus Ntiag Tug no piav qhia tias Chatforia (“peb”, “peb”) sau, siv, thiab sib koom cov ntaub ntawv thaum koj siv peb apps thiab kev pab. Peb tsim Chatforia kom txo qis cov ntaub ntawv peb tuaj yeem nkag tau.

infoWeCollect.title: Cov ntaub ntawv peb sau
infoWeCollect.account: Account ntaub ntawv (e.g., email/xov tooj) los tsim thiab ruaj ntseg koj account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted ntsiab lus (lus/hu) yog end-to-end encrypted; peb tsis tuaj yeem nyeem nws.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/kev siv xws li crash logs, ntaus ntawv hom, lossis coarse analytics los txhim kho kev ua haujlwm.

sms.title: Mobile xov tooj lej thiab SMS
sms.body: Yog koj xaiv muab mobile xov tooj lej, peb siv nws los qhib yam ntxwv xws li account txheeb xyuas, kos npe ceeb toom, thiab neeg-rau-neeg xa xov SMS qhov twg txhawb. Peb yuav xa transactional SMS lus cuam tshuam rau koj account thiab kev ua haujlwm ntawm Chatforia. Koj tuaj yeem tso tseg tau txais SMS lus txhua lub sijhawm los ntawm teb nrog ib lo lus tso tseg txhawb (xws li “STOP”) lossis los ntawm hloov koj notification nyiam hauv app. Peb tsis muag koj xov tooj lej lossis siv nws rau kev lag luam tsis cuam tshuam.
sms.enterRecipient: Sau ib lub npe lossis tus lej
sms.addRecipient: Ntxiv ib tus neeg txais saum toj no kom pib…

howWeUse.title: Peb siv ntaub ntawv li cas
howWeUse.provide: Muab thiab ruaj ntseg kev pab (auth, spam/abuse detection).
howWeUse.improve: Txhim kho yam ntxwv (txhais lus zoo, kev ntseeg siab).
howWeUse.legal: Ua raws li kev cai lij choj.

sharing.title: Sib koom
sharing.body: Peb tsis muag tus kheej ntaub ntawv. Peb yuav sib koom tsawg ntaub ntawv nrog processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) raws li nruj daim ntawv cog lus.

rights.title: Koj txoj cai
rights.body: Nyob ntawm koj cheeb tsam (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), koj tuaj yeem thov nkag, kho, tshem, lossis tso tseg qee yam kev ua. Hu: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Cov ntaub ntawv khaws cia & kev ruaj ntseg
retention.body: Peb khaws tsuas yog qhov xav tau los khiav kev pab thiab siv kev ruaj ntseg qauv kev lag luam. E2E ntsiab lus tsis tuaj yeem decrypt los ntawm peb.

children.title: Cov menyuam

intro.body: Los ntawm kev siv Chatforia koj pom zoo rau cov Cai no. Yog koj tsis pom zoo, tsis txhob siv kev pab.

acceptableUse.title: Kev siv tau
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Tsis muaj kev txhaum cai, tsim txom, lossis txhaum cai ntsiab lus; tsis muaj spam lossis automated tsim txom.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Peb yuav ncua/lossis txiav rau kev ua txhaum.

sms.title: SMS kev sib txuas lus
sms.body: Yog koj muab mobile xov tooj lej, koj pom zoo tias Chatforia yuav xa SMS lus cuam tshuam rau koj account thiab kev siv kev pab, xws li kos npe ceeb toom, kev ruaj ntseg ceeb toom, thiab lus cuam tshuam rau kev sib tham koj pib lossis koom. Peb tsis siv SMS rau kev tshaj tawm lossis kev lag luam lus yam tsis muaj koj pom zoo meej. Tus nqi xov tooj thiab cov ntaub ntawv yuav siv. Koj tuaj yeem tso tseg SMS lus txhua lub sijhawm los ntawm teb nrog ib lo lus tso tseg txhawb (piv txwv, “STOP”) lossis los ntawm hloov koj notification settings hauv app.

yourContent.title: Koj cov ntsiab lus
yourContent.body: Koj khaws txoj cai rau koj cov ntsiab lus. Koj muab peb txoj cai tsim nyog los khiav kev pab (e.g., routing, khaws cia, txhais lus).

disclaimer.title: Tsis lees paub & lav ris
disclaimer.body: Kev pab yog muab “raws li yog” tsis muaj kev lees paub. Rau qhov siab tshaj plaws raws li txoj cai tso cai, Chatforia tsis lav ris rau kev puas tsuaj tsis ncaj los sis txuas ntxiv.

press.title: Xov xwm
press.contactLine: Rau xov xwm nug, hu peb ntawm
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia yog ib tus ntiag tug ua ntej xa xov app uas ua kom hla-hom lus sib tham yooj yim. Cov lus yog end-to-end encrypted los ntawm qub, thiab built-in txhais lus txhawb 100+ hom lus hauv real time. Cov neeg siv tuaj yeem qhib cov lus ploj mus, khaws nyeem tau daim ntawv xaiv tau, thiab sync hla ntaus ntawv. Muaj ntawm iOS, Android, thiab web.
press.scanTip: Ntawm desktop? Luam nrog koj lub xov tooj kom tau app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Peb yog ib pab pawg me tsim Chatforia — ib tus ntiag tug, global xa xov app tso tawm ntawm web, iOS, thiab Android. Yog koj mob siab rau tus ntiag tug, encryption, thiab delightful neeg siv kev paub, peb xav hnov los ntawm koj.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Yuav thov li cas: Siv lub khawm hauv qab los email koj resume thiab links.
careers.whyNow: Vim li cas koom tam sim no?
careers.whyBullets:
• Pab tsim lub hauv paus ntawm ib tus xa xov global tshiab.
• Ship txhim kho siv hla web, iOS, thiab Android.
• Ua haujlwm ncaj qha nrog tus tsim rau architecture thiab khoom coj.
• Muaj lub luag haujlwm siab-impact ntawm stack: xa xov, suab, yees duab, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Koom thaum pib — ua ntej cov neeg siv loj hlob.

about.title: Hais txog Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia yog ib tus ruaj ntseg, ntau hom lus xa xov nrog end-to-end encryption, tam sim txhais lus, thiab suab/yees duab hu. Peb lub hom phiaj yooj yim: pab cov neeg txuas—ruaj ntseg, tus ntiag tug, thiab hla hom lus.
